response.overview: Shiori Tsukada stars as a J-Cup beauty who finds herself home alone while her parents visit their hometown. Overcome by a sudden surge of forbidden desire, she spends her days inviting men over to explore every corner of the house. This production features the "Hyper-Breast" actress being handled by multiple men, focusing on her sensitive backside and massive chest in a high-intensity, "nympho-style" performance.
response.tagline: With the parents away, the J-Cup girl will play.
response.title: Jカップ敏感巨尻少女
